title: Geneviève Baillargeon Bouchard
content:
## Geneviève Baillargeon Bouchard
People.ContactEmail gbbouchard@mccarthy.ca
Geneviève Baillargeon Bouchard is a partner in our litigation group of Québec City office. Her practice focuses primarily on civil litigation, with a particular emphasis on medical liability and professional responsibility matters. Since the beginning of her practice, she has been representing clients before all levels of judicial courts, including the Supreme Court of Canada. The legal issues for which she is mandated by her clients also frequently led her to appear before various administrative bodies, including administrative tribunals and professional orders. She is dedicated and client-focused and brings deep expertise and practical insight to complex disputes, ensuring that her clients are supported at every stage of the litigation process.
Ms. Baillargeon Bouchard has also been teaching administrative law at the École du Barreau de Québec during many years. She has published various articles and spoken at numerous conferences, covering issues such as expert evidence, human rights and freedoms and the use of social media and information technology.
Ms. Baillargeon Bouchard received her bachelor’s degree in law (international profile) with honours from Université Laval in 2008 and was called to the Québec Bar in 2009. She has been actively involved with the Québec Bar since 2015, acting as Chair of the Professional Training Committee from 2019 to 2022, and since 2023, as Chair of the Services to the population Committee.
Ms. Baillargeon Bouchard is the author of four chapters of LégisPratique – Les objections à la preuve en droit civil, 2 nd edition, published by LexisNexis.
- Canadian Legal Lexpert Directory Leading Lawyer: Medical Negligence
